commits.message: GRIMOIRE coverage: added 4 test files (217 tests) — pilar-3 (CORPOS/TRIGEMEO/TEMPERAMENTO), pilar-4 (16 Odu, requer_terreiro===true), pilar-5a (hexagramas 1-32), pilar-5b (hexagramas 33-64)
test(grimoire): add tests for escala-temporal, ayahuasca-protocols, ewe-database

traducao-areas.test.ts.note: added 8 new tests for TRADUCOES_DETALHADO matrix; previously 29 tests covered traducao-areas helpers only

note: TRADUCOES_DETALHADO: 5 pilasters × 8 areas = 40 entries, each with 6 required fields (frase/explicacao/convergencia/tensao/evitar/pratica). shadow-sintomas.test.ts and traducao-areas.test.ts both pre-existed from prior session.
